description: Authoritative format spec for machine-readable validation records emitted by platform validation entrypoints. Records are appended to a JSONL file and mirrored to a latest.json file for easy inspection.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this validation record. Generated as 'val-' + first 8 hex chars of uuid4.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this record. Must be '1.0.0' for records emitted by this spec.

emitted_at.description: Timestamp when this record was emitted.

emitter.description: Repo-relative path to the script or module that emitted this record. Example: 'bin/run_baseline_validation.py'.

outcome.description: Overall outcome of this validation run.

session_id.description: Optional. Session identifier grouping this validation with a broader execution context. See governance/canonical_id_spec.json.

job_id.description: Optional. Job identifier for this validation unit. See governance/canonical_id_spec.json.

checks.description: List of individual check results within this validation run.

artifact_refs.description: List of artifact paths written or referenced by this validation run.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes about this validation run.

output_location.description: records.jsonl is append-only; one JSON line per record. latest.json is a normal single JSON object overwritten on each emit to reflect the most recent record.

output_policy.records_jsonl: append-only — one JSON line appended per emit call; never overwritten
output_policy.latest_json: overwrite — always reflects the single most recent emitted record
output_policy.dry_run: dry_run=True writes nothing and returns None
output_policy.error_handling: OSError is re-raised with added context; callers should catch and degrade gracefully
